race.comment: INVINCIBLE THIEF (9) flew home when back to 1400m last time out after winning at this track and trip two starts ago. The form out of her run last start has been franked (2 wins from 2 starters) and she's better suited here. Expecting her to return to winning ways. CLASSIC IMPACT (11) led them up last start over this course and distance and bolted away to score by 2.3L as the race favourite. She drops back to 54kg today with this being a little tougher, but her recent form stacks right up. Can roll forward from the draw and will take plenty of catching again. BIRD'S THE WORD (6) held on to score in a photo finish last time out and steps out to 1800m for the second time. He has enough speed to roll across from the draw and be up front under Steve Parnham. Won't be far away. JUST LEROY (12) is better than he showed last start and can bounce back to form. MISTRESS OF WAR (13) can put her best foot forward if she runs to recent form.
